creator: irenepila_
caption:
Non sarò MAI stanca di scoprire il mondo 🌎✈️

_____________

#travel #viaggiare #bellezza #felicita

transcription.text: I know you're happy, but not like how you were with me I'm selfish, I'm mean, I can't let you go So find someone brave and don't fight it, no one's gonna find you I know you're happy, I wish you all noticed I hate to say you never paid me, just not like you loved me
